summary: Completed backend testing of ShipRocket admin integration endpoints. All 3 endpoints working correctly with proper authentication.

1_shiprocket_status_endpoint.details: Returns configured=true, connected=true, email, stats (orders_synced: 2, orders_pending_sync: 0)

2_manual_sync_endpoint.details: Successfully synced test order TEST-SR-WORKFLOW-001 to ShipRocket (order_id: 1184863546, shipment_id: 1181208056). Returns 'already synced' for previously synced orders. Returns 404 for non-existent orders. Returns 400 for unpaid orders.

3_batch_sync_endpoint.details: Returns batch sync results: total, synced, failed counts. Currently 0 pending orders as all paid orders are synced.

4_authentication.details: All endpoints correctly require admin authentication. Returns 401 for unauthenticated requests.

5_automatic_sync_on_payment.details: verify-payment endpoint at line 352 correctly calls push_order_to_shiprocket after successful payment. Stores shiprocket_order_id, shiprocket_shipment_id, shiprocket_awb_code in order document.

critical_code_review_comments: shiprocket_service.py: clean_phone_number function properly formats 10-digit Indian numbers
admin.py lines 1346-1527: All ShipRocket admin endpoints properly use require_admin middleware
orders.py lines 442-469: Automatic ShipRocket sync has proper error handling - failures don't break payment verification
orders.py: push_order_to_shiprocket correctly builds payload with shipping/billing details, package dimensions

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed, 1 skipped due to duplicate test order)

seed_data_creation: Created test order TEST-SR-WORKFLOW-001 for sync testing (synced to ShipRocket with order_id: 1184863546)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ShipRocket integration is fully working. 2 orders currently synced: ADD-ZOHO-TEST-001 (order_id: 1184859627) and TEST-SR-WORKFLOW-001 (order_id: 1184863546). Admin login endpoint is POST /api/admin/login (not /api/auth/admin/login). ShipRocket credentials configured in backend/.env. Automatic sync happens in verify-payment endpoint after successful payment.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All ShipRocket endpoints working as expected. Integration properly configured.
